Glyph11 — HTTP/1.1 parser benchmarks

UltraHardenedParser · ns/op, lower is better · loading…

Latency by payload

Loading…

All implementations, one chart

The same hardened parser, measured the same way (warmup + timed loop) on identical payloads. C# Ultra (ROM / multi-seg) is the standalone managed parser; Pure C is the native core; the bindings reach that core from .NET (P/Invoke) and the JVM (Kotlin / Panama FFM).
github.com/dotnet-web-stack/Glyph11
